inputs.label: Weight in Kilograms
inputs.businessContext: The weight of a single item or total weight in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight of a single item or total weight in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir öğenin ağırlığı veya kilogram cinsinden toplam ağırlık.

inputs.label: Number of Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of items with the given weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items with the given weight.

inputs.label: Packaging Weight
inputs.businessContext: Additional packaging weight per batch in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional packaging weight per batch in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti başına kilogram cinsinden ek ambalaj ağırlığı.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from kilograms to grams (1 kg = 1000 g). Typically 1000, but can be adjusted for specific density/materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from kilograms to grams (1 kg = 1000 g). Typically 1000, but can be adjusted for specific density/materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogramdan grama standart dönüşüm faktörü (1 kg = 1000 g). Tipik olarak 1000, ancak belirli yoğunluk/malzemeler için ayarlanabilir.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
